title: Rounding to the Nearest Power of 2

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Given a positive integer n, find the integer that is the nearest power of 2 to n.
statement.outputFormat: Return the nearest power of 2 as an integer.
statement.notes: Time complexity: O(log n), Space complexity: O(1)

examples.explanation: 2 is the nearest power of 2 to 3
4 is the nearest power of 2 to 5

hints.text: Find the largest power of 2 less than or equal to n

editorial.title: Rounding to the Nearest Power of 2
editorial.intuition: We need to find the largest power of 2 less than or equal to n.
editorial.bruteForce: Try all powers of 2 until we find the one that is greater than n.
editorial.betterSolution: Use binary search to find the largest power of 2 less than or equal to n.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use bitwise operations to find the largest power of 2 less than or equal to n.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: If we find the largest power of 2 less than or equal to n, then the next power of 2 will be greater than n.
editorial.dryRun: Let n = 10. The largest power of 2 less than or equal to 10 is 8.
